KCL: KCL申请严格按照官网的课程录取要求来申请，不同的课程录取要求分别对应国内211院校&双一流院校、双非院校的不同分数：
官网课程学位等级要求
If your degree is graded as a Grade Point Average（GPA）, note that we will normally be looking for a minimum cumulative GPA of 3.3-3.5 on a 4.0 scale.

You will be a stronger candidate for admission if you have high grades and are attending a university considered prestigious (listed as prestigious by UK ENIC or within the Project 211/Double First Class list of institutions)；分数越高，能够拿到offer 的概率越大。

For postgraduate programmes within the King’s Business School and some programmes (i.e. Data Science MSc, Master of Laws (LLM), Political Economy MA, Public Policy MA): offers will usually only be made to applicants from universities considered prestigious by UK ENIC at the point of assessment. A 'prestigious institution' is one which is classified as by UK ENIC or within the Project 211/Double First Class list of institutions
商学院和部分专业（Data Science MSc, Master of Laws (LLM), Political Economy MA, Public Policy MA）只会给211院校&双一流院校的申请者发offer
Human Resource Management & Organisational Analysis MSc
Peace, Security and International Law MA
爱丁堡: 申请爱丁堡硕士课程，要求需要达到两点：

●1.A first degree from a university on our Priority List of Chinese universities or a Recognized University
大学的第一个学位是中国大学的《优先名单》（《Priority List》），或者是受认可的大学。Priority List的构成为：list的构成为：985+211+双一流院校的专业+深圳大学+南方科技大学+中外合作院校；

● 2.找出每个学位课程所需的分数
检查官网“入学要求”（Entry Requirement）下列出的课程档位字母A、B、C或D，来对应其录取要求
每个档位的录取要求如下：
A：在我们授权的《优先名单》中具有85%, 商学院的专业基本上是Band A，Law School专业几本也是BandA，还有一个Science Communication and Public Engagement MSc，不在《优先名单》中就不要申请商学院了

B：在我们授权的《优先名单》中具有80% 至少有80%所大学在我们的优先名单上获奖。GRE/GMAT只作为辅助材料，不作为必须加持

C：在我们授权的《优先名单》中具有80% 或者在任何受认可的大学中达到85%  ，理工科、教育、艺术专业都在Band C；这里会偏重Priority List的学生，也会有一些名额给被认可院校的高分同学。根据专业的特殊性，某项专项院校也不是完全没有优势。

D：在受认可的大学中达到80%

Tips：
· 申请的同学是必须达到均分最低要求的，即便差一两分也是不行的，而且踩线也拿到offer的概率很小；
· Band A和B，只认可《优先名单》上面的大学和双一流专业；Band C和D会对优先名单和受认可名单大学开放；
· 判断学校是否在受认可的名单上，只要是学信网能查证的本科院校，都会在受认可的大学名单中，如果不确定的话，就发邮件给futurestudents@ed.ac.uk；
· List中只认双一流的专业，其学校的其他专业都不在《优先名单》 里面，举例：成都理工大学只有地质专业属于《优先名单》，其他专业都不是

中外合作办学项目，2+2，3+1，4+0等等，那需要看看他们想要申请的专业是哪个Band，如果是Band A或者B，那需要同学在国内的院校也在我们的《优先名单》里面。如果是申请Band C或者D专业，则国内院校要求没那么严格，但均分必须要是超过最低要求。同时看中方和外方的成绩单。

We operate a non-staged admissions process for this programme. Provided your application is complete we aim to give you a decision on your application within 3 months from the date on which it was submitted. However, due to the competition for places and the volume of applications received, it may take longer than the standard time frame to receive an outcome. Please note that all places are subject to availability.

Applications placed after 30th June 2026 may be considered at our discretion if there are still places available on the programme.

Applicants who are made a conditional offer of a place must demonstrate that they have met all the conditions of their offer by 31 July 2026.

LSE:
对于中国申请者，
来自中国TOP35大学的拥有学士学位的申请者，在校平均分需达到85分
来自非中国TOP35大学的申请者，在校平均分至少需达到90分


语言要求：
雅思：需达到7.0，且各单项不低于7.0
托福（IBT）：总分至少107，各单项不低于25


申请LSE商科专业，除了GPA与雅思成绩，强烈建议考个GMAT（720+），为你的申请加持一下。
并不是所有商科都需要提供GMAT成绩，但是明确表明需要GMAT成绩的专业有：
Accounting and Finance
Finance
Finance and Private Eqnity
Finance and Economics
Real Estate Economics and Finance
除了标化成绩，LSE招生官会仔细研究你的大学学术能力。LSE的招生官会仔细评估每个申请者最近的大学学术记录，研究哪些科目，这些研究项目的研究成果和成功程度。以及学生在社会科学领域的学术工作经验。

伯明翰:
1.Completed the GAOKAO with minimum 80% overall average  - including 80% in Mathematics if required at A-level
高考总分（百分比换算）需达到80%或以上
对Alevel数学有要求的专业，则需要高考数学单科（百分比换算）达到80%

2.Completed Senior Secondary School Graduation Certificate with minimum 85% overall (year 11 and year 12) - including 85% in relevant subjects where required at A level.
完成高中课程获得毕业证书，高中均分达85%或以上（即指11年级和12年级）
- 对A level 相关科目有要求的专业，则需要相关科目达到85%

3.Meet our standard English language entry requirement for international students for undergraduate programmes
满足国际学生直读本科课程的标准英语入学要求

中国院校名单参考各类综合中国大学排名，该名单仅供合作伙伴内部参考使用，各学院及课程

接受的院校范围以伯明翰大学官方网站信息为准。
如您对院校有疑问，请联系伯明翰大学中国办公室：China@contacts.bham.ac.uk

4. Year 1 of a bachelor’s degree from a recognised prestigious institution, provided that grades to match the UK A-level equivalencies as follows.
a. A*A*A at A level = 82% average or higher 
b. A*AA at A level = 80% average or higher 
c. AAA at A level = 78% average or higher
d. AAB at A level = 76% average or higher

• 学生需在海外有至少两年的学习经验
• HND/Top-up背景类学生需要在海外至少有两年学习经验

•  Rest of the Uni includes programmes in Computer Science and Data Science.

返回总表

1.  School of Law has separate institution list.法学院有单独的院校名单。

2.  We accept HND/SQA AD (BB/BBB/60%/Merit) + final year/top-ups to a UK Bachelor degree (studied in the UK only), and 3 years Chinese Junior Diploma (Dazhuan) + 1/2 years final years/top-ups to a Bachelor degree as long as applicants meet the grade requirement (e.g. 2.1) in both parts of the programme.
诺丁汉大学接受HND学生（BB/BBB/Merit/60%）+ 1年在英国大学取得本科学历，以及国内3年大专 + 1/2年本科学历来申请硕士 (各阶段学历都需要达到对应的分数要求）。

3.  Bachelor degrees obtained via 2-year China Diploma plus 1-year top-up in the UK cannot be accepted by any Departments/Schools at UoN.任何学院都不接受 2年在国内大专+1年在英国 top-up 获得本科学位的学生。

4.  For students studying a 3+1 joint programme, we would expect an offer to be made on their second part, but for them to have also achieved our requirement (e.g., 2:1) in part 1 of their programme. If students studying a 2+2 joint programme, decision will be made only based on their overseas transcripts.
如果学生的本科学位是中外合作项目（3+1）我们会要求学生的中外两份成绩均符合要求，即国内成绩符合我们对国内院校的分数对应要求，国外成绩符合我们对英同等要求（比如2:1/2:2）。如果通过2+2项目在海外就读两年时间，则不需要国内段成绩单。

5.  If you have already completed (within two years of University of Nottingham course start date) or are currently completing a UK Degree where at least 1 full academic year was studied in the UK, then you may be exempt from an additional English language test.  Please see below:
若您已在所申请的诺丁汉大学课程开始日期前两年内完成（或正在修读）英国学位课程，且其中至少一整学年是在英国境内完成，我们对于英语语言要求如下：

——2+ academic years’ study in the UK are likely to automatically satisfy the English language requirements of your course在英国完成两学年及以上学术课程的学习，通常可自动满足所申请课程的英语语言要求
——1 full academic year study in the UK (3+1 students, including HND/SQA AD+1), a minimum Upper Second Class / 2:1 academic award is required to satisfy the English language requirements of your course
在英国完成一整学年学习（3+1项目学生, 含HND/SQA AD+1），需取得二等一荣誉学位（Upper Second Class/2:1）或更高学术成绩，方可满足所申请课程的英语语言要求

6. Depending on the tiers of institutions applicants graduated from, the Chinese grade equivalence varies. The ranges are demonstrated as below:
根据院校名单，各英本学位所对应的中国本科均分区间如下:

High 2:1/1st: 75% - 82%

2:1: 72% - 80%

2:2: 68% - 75%

• 我校可接受 1 年或 2 年的专升本学位进行申请（含中国 3+2 专升本；前置学历为大专、SQA HND 或 Advanced Diploma 等），提交申请时专科等级的学术材料也需要提供，Offer 下发基于本科阶段学位，专科阶段的大学是否在院校名单不重要
• 如所申请专业有特别课程要求（如数学），且本科阶段未修过相关课程/不满足所需成绩，我校会 case by case参考专科成绩

（1）合作办学（TNE 4+0,3+1,2+2）需满足以下条件：
• 学位由我校认可的大学授予
<1> 如合作办学的双方仅一方大学为我校认可大学，则需要认可大学的成绩满足我校要求；如所申请专业有特
别课程要求（如数学），则需要这些课程在认可大学上学期间完成（联合培养除外）

<2> 如中外双方均授予完整学位，我校可参考任一方学位，如一方满足成绩要求另一方不满足，则参考满足要
求一方的学位
以上两项目免语言要求

需主要英语国家（不含加拿大，除非加拿大籍）的我校认可大学参与授课&授予学位
• 最后一年（或等同于最后一年/或等同于 120 UK 学分）在主要英语国家完成
• 提交申请时需上传签证（英国院校需上传 BRP）；如申请已提交且 Offer 条件有语言成绩，可在该条件处上传签证/BRP 来满足语言要求；如果同时上传了不符合要求的语言成绩，很可能无法免除语言要求

巴斯: Specific pre-resquisites or other things to look for
Translated Specific pre-requisites（中文录取要求）

Proficiency in calculus and linear algebra, a good foundation in probability and statistics, and familiarity with Python required. Any  numerate background considered but if it's not clear from unit names that they've covered the prerequisites we may ask for more info. Maths/Physics degree at 2:1 level - they're probably fine.
需要本科学习过代数和微积分，概率学与统计基础，以及对 Python 的熟悉。任何具有一定数量背景的专业都可以考虑，但如果从课程名称中无法明确看出申请人已具备这些先修知识，我们可能会要求提供更多信息。如果申请人拥有数学或物理专业的2:1学位，一般来说是符合要求的。
Advanced Quantitive Methods in Social Sciences

High 2:2s considered if evidence of suitability provided. Applicants need to ensure they provide a personal statement in accordance with the requirements on the programme page. In particular, they need to provide information regarding their specific research interests in relation to the programme. Applicants must also have a substantial quant background in their existing qualifications.
如果申请人能够提供其适合该项目的相关证明材料，也会考虑高分的2:2学位（即英国本科二等下荣誉学位）。申请人需确保其个人陈述符合该项目网页上的具体要求，尤其需要详细说明其与该项目相关的具体研究兴趣。此外，申请人还必须在现有学历背景中具备扎实的定量分析能力。
Psychology degree, GBC, high marks (2:1 equiv.) in research methods/stats/dissertation, PS should discuss research experience and the skills and knowledge they bring to the course.
如果是心理学专业背景，需具备英国心理学会认可的GBC（Graduate Basis for Chartership）资格，在研究方法、统计学和毕业论文等相关模块中取得较高成绩（相当于英国本科2:1等级）。个人陈述中应重点介绍其研究经历，以及他们将为本课程带来的相关技能和知识。
Require a good standard of algebra and calculus
需要本科学习过代数和微积分基础。
Applied Economics with Banking and Financial Markets
Require a good standard of algebra and calculus
需要本科学习过代数和微积分基础。
Psychology degree, strong grades in Research Methods, Graduate Basis for Chartership (not required when applying but will be needed for unconditional offer)
心理学专业背景，需在研究方法课程中取得优异成绩。申请时无需具备英国心理学会认可的GBC（Graduate Basis for Chartership）资格，但如获录取，需在满足此条件后才能获得无条件录取。
Not a course for a carer/counsellor.
本课程并不适合希望从事护理或心理咨询工作的申请者。

If transcripts are not documenting certain base level of mathematical proficiency required (in particular Linear Algebra, Calculus, and Probability and Statistics), provide syllabuses or any certificates as evidence of these subjects are covered in your studies.
需要在本科学习过线性代数、微积分，以及概率与统计
Artificial Intelligence for Engineering and Design

To apply for this course you should have an undergraduate degree in a numerate subject, such as computer science, mathematics, physics, economics, engineering, or relevant social sciences. You should also be able to demonstrate proficiency in mathematical topics such as calculus and linear algebra, possess some familiarity with probability and statistics, and have a good foundation in programming.

要申请本课程，申请人本科需是以下与数学相关的专业，例如计算机科学、数学、物理、经济学、工程学或相关社会科学专业。
此外，还应具备以下能力和背景：

熟练掌握数学相关知识，如微积分和线性代数；

学习过概率和统计；

拥有良好的编程基础。
To apply for this course, you should have an undergraduate degree in mechanical engineering, automotive engineering, electrical engineering or vehicle engineering.
要申请该课程，你应拥有机械工程、汽车工程、电气工程或车辆工程方面的本科学位。
To apply for this course, you should have an undergraduate degree in mechanical engineering, electrical engineering, automotive engineering and vehicle engineering.
要申请该课程，你应拥有机械工程、电气工程、汽车工程或车辆工程方面的本科学位。

To apply for this course, you should have an undergraduate degree in mechanical, electrical, civil or chemical engineering, maths, physics, computer science, software engineering, manufacturing engineering, product design, chemistry or national sciences.
申请该课程，你应拥有以下专业之一的本科学位：机械工程、电气工程、土木工程、化学工程、数学、物理、计算机科学、软件工程、制造工程、产品设计、化学或自然科学。

To apply for this course, you should have an undergraduate degree in mechanical, electrical, civil or chemical engineering, maths, physics, computer science, software engineering, manufacturing engineering, product design, chemistry or national sciences.
申请该课程，您应拥有以下领域之一的本科学位：机械工程、电气工程、土木工程、化学工程、数学、物理、计算机科学、软件工程、制造工程、产品设计、化学或自然科学。
A BSc background with Biology-related units is preferred. Other Science or engineering background can be considered if enough relevant modules included.
优先考虑具有生物相关课程背景的理学学士学位申请人。如果其他理工科背景中包含足够相关模块，也可予以考虑。
A Biology and Pharmacology background is preferred. Other degree can be considered if there are enough relevant modules
优先考虑具有生物学或药理学背景的申请人。如其他专业背景中包含足够相关模块，也可予以考虑。
A BSc background with Biology-related units is preferred. Other Science or engineering background can be considered if enough relevant modules included.
优先考虑具有生物相关课程背景的理学学士学位申请者。如果其他理科或工程类背景中包含足够相关模块，也可予以考虑。

Applicants must have an existing social sciences degree (Psychology, Sociology, Geography, Policy Studies, Socio-Legal Studies.) - applicants without this background will be rejected. Applicants need to ensure they provide a personal statement in accordance with the requirements on the programme page. In particular, they need to provide information regarding their specific research interests in relation to the programme.
申请者必须持有社会科学相关学位（如心理学、社会学、地理学、政策研究、社会法律研究等），没有该背景的申请将被拒绝。申请人需确保个人陈述符合项目网页上的要求，特别是需要详细说明其与该项目相关的具体研究兴趣。

Knowledge of mathematics (especially algebra, calculus, and discrete mathematics) and/or quantitative skills, at least at A Level Mathematics or equivalent (online mathematics courses offered on common platforms such as Coursera and Udemy may also be accepted)
本科需要学习过数学（尤其是代数、微积分和离散数学）和/或定量分析能力，至少达到A Level数学或同等水平（通过Coursera、Udemy等常见在线平台完成的数学课程也可能被认可）。

To apply for this course, you should have an undergraduate degree in any discipline relating to the built environment including architecture, engineering, surveying, planning, geography, archaeology, history or management.

We will also consider your application if you have an undergraduate degree in other disciplines, such as history of art, and wish to gain a vocational degree.

申请该课程，你需拥有与建筑环境相关领域的本科学位，包括建筑学、工程、测绘、规划、地理、考古、历史或管理等专业。

如果你拥有其他专业的本科学位（例如艺术史），但希望获得一项职业导向型学位，我们也会考虑你的申请。
Contemporary European Studies with Transatlantic Track (Euromasters)
Applicants must mention why they specifically want to take the Transatlantic track in their personal statement.
申请者必须在个人陈述中说明他们为何特别选择跨大西洋（Transatlantic）方向。
Not a law degree. No additional information required
非法律学位。不需要提供额外信息。

Knowledge of Calculus and Linear Algebra required, knowledge of Probability and Statistics preferred, knowledge of programming (e.g. Python, R, Matlab, Java, C++) is a bonus. Generally strong numerate skills.
本科需要学习过微积分和线性代数知识，具备概率与统计知识者优先；具备编程技能（如Python、R、Matlab、Java、C++）者为佳。整体需具备较强的数理能力。

Wide variety of degree backgrounds considered, preferably with a numerate element however not necessarily advanced. Could evidence this via professional experience (e.g. bookeeping for a small business)
无背景要求，只要在PS中展示出对该专业的了解和兴趣即可
具备扎实的化学相关背景。

Strict on need for UG economics/maths background, in particular micro/macroeconomics, econometrics, stats, calculus, algebra. Applicants with an interest in the subject but who don't have these units are better placed applying for Applied Economics. High 2:2s considered but need AT approval.
严格要求本科具备经济学或数学背景，尤其是微观经济学、宏观经济学、计量经济学、统计学、微积分和代数课程。对该学科感兴趣但未修读相关课程的申请者，建议申请应用经济学专业。对于高分的2:2学位申请者，需获得教学助理（AT）的批准方可考虑。

Strict on need for UG economics/maths background, in particular micro/macroeconomics, econometrics, stats.  Applicants need to ensure they provide a personal statement in accordance with the requirements on the programme page. In particular, they need to provide information regarding their specific research interests in relation to the programme.
本科阶段必须具备经济学或数学背景，尤其需修读微观经济学、宏观经济学、计量经济学和统计学等课程。申请人需确保其个人陈述符合项目网页上的要求，特别是需详细说明其与该项目相关的具体研究兴趣。

Strict on need for UG economics/maths background, in particular micro/macroeconomics, econometrics, stats, calculus, algebra. Applicants with an interest in the subject but who don't have these units are better placed applying for Applied Economics. High 2:2s considered but need AT approval.
严格要求本科具备经济学或数学背景，特别是需修读微观经济学、宏观经济学、计量经济学、统计学、微积分和代数等课程。对于对该专业有兴趣但未修读上述课程的申请者，更适合申请应用经济学相关项目。高分的2:2学位可予以考虑，但需获得学术主管（AT）批准。

Clear undersatnding of the aim of an Mres course, specific interest reserch must be clear on their statement, Social Science degrees are acceptable, public or privite sector experince in policy making or research are bonus
申请者需对MRes课程的培养目标有清晰理解，个人陈述中必须明确表达其具体的研究兴趣。社会科学类学位背景可接受，具备公共或私营部门政策制定或研究相关经验者将被优先考虑。
To apply for this course, you should have an undergraduate degree in engineering or management or another relevant subject.
申请该课程，你需拥有工程、管理或其他相关专业的本科学位。

High 2:2 considered if evidence of suitability for degree provided. Applicants need to ensure they provide a personal statement in accordance with the requirements on the programme page. 如能提供其适合该课程的相关证明材料，可考虑高分的2:2学位申请者。申请人需确保个人陈述符合项目网页上的要求，特别是需明确说明其与该项目相关的具体研究兴趣。

This is currently the most rigorous Master's in the Dept of Maths. Mathematics or joint Mathematics would be the typical/preferred background. If atypical background, ideally they'd have 2:1 or better performance in pure maths units that cover calc and linear algebra, have at least intro level prob & stats, and at least intro level programming.
这是数学系目前最严谨的硕士课程。数学或联合数学专业背景为典型或优先考虑对象。若申请人背景较为非典型，则理想情况下应在涵盖微积分和线性代数的纯数学课程中取得2:1或以上成绩，并至少具备初级水平的概率与统计知识及编程能力。

Must be a qualified medical doctor, preferably FY2 or more experienced. If they've only just completed FY1 then they would preferably have some sport med exposure and access to football-specific pool of patients.
申请者必须是具备资质的医生，优先考虑完成FY2或有更丰富经验者。如仅完成FY1，最好有运动医学相关经验，并能接触到以足球为主的特定患者群体。
Can consider applicants based entirely on relevant work experience if degree background is irrelevant.
如学位背景不相关，可根据其相关工作经验单独进行考虑。
Global Challenges: Geopolitics, Inequalities and Mobilities

非标准学历（如高等文凭DipHE、本科普通学位）若成绩较高和/或具备相关教学或行政经验，将提交学术主管（AT）审核。低分的2:2学位也可能被接受，但需由学术主管酌情决定。
Nothing specific in addition to published requirements

我校接收符合要求的合作办学背景来申请我校硕士，具体如下：
2+2（单/双学位）：
申请人需提供在英国或学位授予国完成的后两年学习成绩，成绩需达到该学位授予国的标准入学要求，例如英国学制的2:1或Good 2:2成绩。如果申请人在UKVI认可的英语国家完成了至少一学年的全日制学习，通常可免除英语语言要求。
X+1（Top-up）：
申请人需提供学位授予国的成绩单，学术成绩需达到该国的标准入学要求。如果申请人在UKVI认可的英语国家完成了至少一学年的全日制学位学习，通常可免除英语语言测试要求。"
X+X（双学位）：
申请时需提供中国及海外院校的成绩单。我们将对申请材料及学术表现进行整体评估。如果中国院校不在我校认可名单中，申请仍可基于认可的海外学位资格进行评估。如果申请人在UKVI认可的英语国家完成了至少一学年的全日制学习，通常可免除英语语言要求。
4+0（双学位）：
申请时需提供中国及海外院校的成绩单。我们将对申请材料及学术表现进行整体评估。如果中国院校不在我校认可名单中，申请仍可基于认可的海外学位资格进行评估。未在英国或UKVI认可国家学习的申请人需满足英语语言要求。
4+0（单一外国学位，仅在中国学习）：
录取将基于学位授予国的入学要求，并需满足英语语言要求。
说明：我们接受所有中国教育部认可的四年制全日制双证(毕业证和学位证)本科毕业生。请参考分层录取要求及相关院校名单。需要注意的是，院校名单仅供参考，我们的admissions团队会全面审核学生申请并作出录取决定。

A1 类大学：国家“双一流”建设高校（含原“985 工程”“211 工程”院校）。
A2 类大学：非“双一流”建设高校。
A3 类大学：其他具有“四年全日制本科双证”资格的高校。如申请人毕业院校不在巴斯大学中国大学列表中，但符合“四年全日制本科双证”要求，则将按照 T3 标准进行审理。
具体院校名单请参见《巴斯大学中国大学列表》。

埃克塞特: 国内本科对应分数要求

语言要求调整（商科、文科及大部分工科专业）：上述类别专业的语言要求将统一调整为：雅思总分 6.5，单项不低于 5.5。
注：目前官网及具体课程的语言要求尚未完成更新，后续更新后将第一时间再次通知。

2026 年奖学金：学校将继续推行多种奖学金组合，单个奖学金的金额范围为 3,000、5,000 或 10,000 英镑三个档位。具体申请条件、评选规则及开放时间等细则，待后续确定后另行通知
埃克塞特大学2:1学位课程名单（除以下课程名单以外的课程皆为2:2专业要求）
MSc Advanced Computer Science with Business
Department of Earth and Environmental Sciences
MSc Marine Vertebrate Ecology and Conservation
MSc Biomedical Data and Artificial Intelligence
兰卡斯特:
补充说明：

1、除了单独说明的部分硕士专业要求相当于英国本科2:2的水平之外，兰卡斯特大学的绝大部分硕士专业均要求申请人的本科学位成绩达到相当于英国本科2:1的水平。根据毕业院校不同，算数平均分要求也有所不同

2、申请硕士，参考兰卡斯特大学认可的中国高校名单，并根据院校的分类，审核学生本科四年的算数平均分是否达到最低入学要求

3、学生四年的整体成绩需要有较好的均衡性和稳定性，对于有较多课程成绩偏低，有过补考或者重修的情况，会增加录取的难度

4、申请部分需要专业背景的硕士专业，会审核申请人是否学习过相关课程，以及与专业相关的课程成绩是否偏低

5、继续教育学院、远程教育学院等的认可程度较低，有别于本校的其他二级学院，部分国际项目无法获得认可

约克:
2025主要变化有：
1）专业录取要求（除与Maastricht University大学联合培养专业MSc Sustainable Business,
Environment and Society和约克赫尔医学院专业外）均按照2：2标准录取
2）语言要求简化，商科取消雅思6.5写作小分单项要求

2025年新开设授课式研究生专业：
● MSc Data Science (Scientific)
● MSc Data Science (Human Behaviour)
● MSc Data Science (Artificial Intelligence and Statistics)
● MSc Digital Design
● MSc Entrepreneurship and Innovation Management
● MSc Logistics and Supply Chain Management
● MSc Neuroscience of Mental Health
● MA Interpreting, Translation and Applied Technologies

2025年新开设授课式本科专业：
● BSc Accounting and Finance
● BA Architecture
● BA Business and Society
● BA Liberal Arts
● BA Digital Media, Culture and Communication
● LLB International Human Rights La

2025年专业名称更新：
● MSc Sustainable Business, Environment and Society (原专业名称为 MSc Sustainable Business: Leadership, Innovation and Management)
● MA in Women's and Gender Studies (原专业名称为 MA Women’s Studies)
● MA Global Culture and Society (原专业名称为 MA in Culture, Society and Globalisation）
● MA Criminology (原专业名称为 MA Criminology and Social Research）
● MSc Data Science (Scientific) (原专业名称为 MSc Data Science）
● MA International Political Economy (原专业名称为 MA in International Political Economy - Critical Theories, Issues and Conflicts)

可跨背景

商科方向
MSc International Business
MSc International Business and Strategic Management
MSc International Strategic Management
MSc Management (2:2)
MSc Global Marketing (2:2)

法学院
LLM Law （Juris Doctor)
LLMInternational Human Rights Law and Practice,一般均分要求80%，如果申请者有至少3年的相关的工作经验，可以考虑75%

传媒
MSc Social Media and Managemet（可以接受绝大部分专业申请)

a) International English Language Testing System (IELTS) (Academic and Online)
b) PTE Academic
c) TOEFL IBT (internet based and special home edition) (TOEFL MyBest score is not 
acceptable for meeting the English language requirement)
d) Trinity ISE
e) Duolingo (except for Hull York Medical School courses)
f) LanguageCert SELT
g) LanguageCert Academic
h) Kaplan International Tools for English (KITE)
i) Skills For English

专升本(函授、自考等等)背景的学生，可以申请硕士：
1.专科部分75%以上
2.本科部分75-80%(参考前面表格)
3.需要本科双证+毕业论文成绩

Top-up背景的学生，可以申请硕士
1.前三年部分75%或HND达到Pass，本科部分达到2:2
2.需要英本学位证

免雅思条件
1.提供英语国家本科学位毕业，则肯定可以免除雅思条件
2.提供全英文授课证明，则大概率可以免除雅思条件

● 此政策调整不适用于约克赫尔医学院申请以及与Maastricht University大学联合培养专业MSc Sustainable Business, Environment and Society。
● 大学只参考“加权平均分”，不参考算术平均分或者均分证明。
● 部分学院或课程对申请人的核心专业课有分数要求(2:2分数要求），请特别注意，包括并不限于计算机学院， 经济学院，音乐教育等相关专业。

授课式研究生专业作品集，推荐信和个人陈述要求：
● 除艺术与人文学院Faculty of Arts and Humanities外，其他学院均不需要提交个人陈述。
● 艺术与人文学院Faculty of Arts and Humanities个别专业有作品集要求，详情见网站：Written Work
● 除约克赫尔医学院专业和Social Work专业以外，其他申请专业均不需要提供推荐信
●MA Education 仅接受教育学背景的学生申请，汉语言文学、语言学等都不接受

Relevant discipline, or can demonstrate misic knowledge and motivation

Candidates must normally have a degree at 2(ii) or above, or equivalent qualification or proven experience in Music.
References are not required for applicants to apply. They are not usually required for a decision to be made but in certain cases, applicants may be asked to provide a single academic reference at the request of the academic selector.
An example of work relevant to the applicant’s study path is required with the application. Anyone applying for more than one study path should provide examples of work in both areas.
For performance, submit two contrasting songs/pieces totalling 7-15 minutes. By ‘contrasting’ we mean songs/pieces that showcase different aspects of the applicant’s musical and technical abilities. We will assess performers working in many genres and styles, e.g., musical theatre, pop vocals and/or classical, operatic singing. A list of our current visiting tutors for performance can be found on the Department of Music web pages. If you cannot see a tutor for your chosen study, please use the email address or Enquire Now button (above) to ask about possible tuition. Whilst we will try to accommodate specific genres/specialisms/instruments, this is not always possible. All performances submitted with applications should be recorded as if live, i.e., without significant editing. Applicants typically include a link to an online video at the end of their personal statement. The video does not need to be made to professional standards; the important thing is that it lets us assess the quality of the performance.
Details about applying for other study paths are in the box below.
For composition, submit at least two contrasting notated compositions. By ‘contrasting’ we mean compositions that showcase different aspects of the applicant’s abilities. Since most composition tuition in the Department involves some form of notation in the tradition of Western art music, we must see the scores for the submitted compositions. If applicants also wish to provide audio or video files of their compositions, we will assess those, but only the notated scores are required. Applicants typically include (a link to) score files and a brief commentary (no more than 500 words) on the submitted work. We will assess composers working in many genres and styles; what we are looking for is evidence of creativity and experimentation as well as a sufficient craft to thrive at master’s level.
For musicology, submit one essay in English of approximately 2000 words. We can assess essays on any music-related topic, and we welcome students adopting any methodological approach (ethnographic, historical, theoretical, etc). The main things we are looking for are coherent academic English and evidence of engagement with relevant scholarly literature (e.g., references to academic sources). We hope to see evidence of a reflective approach to the topic, ideally engaging with recent debates in the field.
For sonic arts, submit at least two contrasting compositions that make good use of technology, which can include electronic music, soundscape composition, audio-visual composition & sound design and music for film and/or games. By 'contrasting' we mean compositions that showcase different aspects of the applicant's technical and creative abilities. Applicants typically include (a link to) audio files and a brief commentary (no more than 500 words) on the submitted work.

• MSc International Masters in Applied Ecology
• MA in Brand Leadership
• MA Broadcast and Digital Journalism UK
• All programmes within the School of Health Sciences, the School of Medicine, the School of Literature, Drama and Creative Writing, School of Pharmacy, School of Education and School of Psychology
其他院校：包括双非院校、附属学院、独立学院及大学分校

UEA热门影视媒体授课型研究生课程学术背景要求调整

为了让有志于学习影视媒体硕士课程的中国学子能够更好地加入UEA，我们自2023年秋季开始全面调整了以下三个UEA热门王牌影视媒体类一年制授课型研究生课程PGT的学术背景要求为：可接受任何社科人文类背景的学生（*包括商科和经济背景），满足上述均分要求即可申请，无需准备作品集和CV；其中，我们将媒体文化与社会，以及影视创意实践这两个专业，从原本的2:1要求调整为了2:2要求。*此调整即时生效，适用于2023年秋季入学的申请者：

MA Film Studies (2:1)

MA Film, Television and Creative Practice (2:2)

MA Media, Culture and Society (2:2)

UEA一年制授课型研究生课程PGT推荐信要求重要更新

自2023年起，UEA社科系下属所有学院（包括商学院，经济学院，法学院，教育学院，国际发展学院，心理学院等）以及部分人文艺术系下属学院（包括历史学院，艺术媒体及美国研究学院，政治哲学及语言研究学院），还有部分科学系下属学院（包括环境科学学院，计算机科学学院），已完全免除了大部分硕士课程申请的推荐信要求。我们已经更新了硕士申请系统，针对无需提供推荐信的硕士专业已将推荐信信息录入的部分从申请系统中移除。*注意：此调整不适用于下列专业及学院（*仍需提交至少一封学术或专业推荐信）：

MBA

MSc Brand Leadership

MA Mathematics Education

MA Second Language Education

MRes Social Science Research Methods (DEV)

MA Arts of Africa, Oceania & the Americas

MA Applied Translation Studies

MA Global Intercultural Communication

MRes Philosophy

Schools of Literature Drama and Creative Writing, Health Sciences, Biological Sciences, Chemistry and Pharmacy
布鲁内尔: •完成国内外预科课程 – 提交课程大纲和评分标准
•不接收插读本科最后一年 ，无top-up课程
•硕士申请要求本科达到英国2：2以上，对应中国本科平均分70或75以上（2013网大排名前559名为70，之后院校为75分）（2:1学位对应75或80分以上，MSc Integrated Product Design 2:2学位需提交作品集）
•接受自考、远程教育取得的本科学位，录取线如上一致
•备注：在英国等传统英语国家取得本科学位申请我校硕士免雅思 （香港、新加坡等地区和国家依然需提交雅思成绩单）
阿斯顿:
工程系统及
管理专业
公共卫生硕士

2. 以上所列预科，本科及研究生申请截止日，均为Equal Consideration Deadline,建议学生在对应截止日期前进行申请。但截止日后，如部分课程仍有名额，学生可联系北京代表处进行申请，从而获得伦艺录取。

申请材料提交后，通过Pebblepad提交的内容将增加为3各个部分：
1， 针对LCF 预科的PS, 需体现出学生的课程结构及内容的了解
2，portfolio, 需要体现学生的手绘能力，尽量不使用软件绘图。同时，学生提交除fashion 项目外其他类别的作品，同时不要求作品集中提交展示。
3，指定tasks 3个，学生可以选择一个或者3个都完成
